module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task orchestration. Cargo.toml now depends on marix-protocol, and session/task internals import shared protocol contracts from that crate.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. ModelRequest carries the model-facing task Step and derives only Debug/Clone now that Step is no longer Eq. ModelBackendImpl exposes only send, bridged to ModelBackend by a blanket impl; DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests, and ModelBackendError converts io, serde_json, and reqwest errors.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, SessionState storage with SessionContext, host-preview bootstrap via ExecutionSignature::new preview queries, Preview tool storage, and signed Step-event routing that is safely ignored as SessionEvent::Step(_, _).

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the implemented task runtime, including StepSignature::new initial-step construction that preserves the task signature and passes the task name as the initial step description for model steps.
